source_name: National Hospital Ambulatory Medical Care Survey (NHAMCS) ED files
population_or_sampling_frame: visits to sampled U.S. hospital emergency departments
critical_limitation: Does not identify exact 60 g exposure episodes or provide a compatible exposed-episode denominator.
Binge/high-intensity definitions and recall windows do not exactly identify every 60 g within-2-hour episode or link outcomes.

source_name: Population Assessment of Tobacco and Health (PATH) Study
primary_contribution: repeated smoking amount, cessation, confounders, self-reported health, biomarkers
population_or_sampling_frame: U.S. civilian noninstitutionalized population aged 9+ at cohort entry
critical_limitation: No single public file supplies all adjudicated 10-year outcomes; attrition and sustained-strategy emulation remain.

source_name: NCHS linked mortality files for NHIS/NHANES
critical_limitation: Smoking is often measured at baseline rather than repeatedly, so sustained continuation/cessation strategies are not directly observed.

source_name: State Unintentional Drug Overdose Reporting System (SUDORS)
population_or_sampling_frame: unintentional/undetermined overdose decedents in participating jurisdictions
critical_limitation: No use-episode denominator; toxicology and scene data do not reconstruct all consumed episodes.

source_name: DEA National Drug Threat Assessment and laboratory/seizure data
critical_limitation: Samples are not a probability sample of consumed products and are not linked to use episodes or outcomes.

population_or_sampling_frame: medically healthy trial-eligible adults with MDD
critical_limitation: Rare serious events remain imprecise; active placebo and functional unblinding require appraisal.
Population is TRD and control is 1 mg psilocybin rather than the primary MDD/placebo estimand.

primary_contribution: future direct 25 mg vs placebo safety evidence
critical_limitation: Cannot contribute results until complete and reported; protocol/support details must be checked.
